title: isodon dakglayensis
intro: Isodon dakglayensis, also known as Dak Glayensis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isodon dakglayensis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried to make herbal teas or tinctures.
